data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for endpoint lifecycle controls and metadata.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for endpoint lifecycle controls and metadata. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific records or details about these controls or metadata, leading to an inconclusive status. The linked use case mentions the need for these controls but does not provide concrete evidence of their existence or functionality.
gaps: No evidence of endpoint lifecycle controls and metadata provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
